response: The probability that a student from Group B exceeds Group A is found by analyzing the difference distribution where mean equals 5 and standard deviation approximates 15.62 yielding a Z-score of 0.32 and a probability near 0.625. The time when performance levels equalize occurs at approximately t equals 3.42 after solving the exponential and logistic equations. This explanation shows how force drives nothing in the process of curriculum design.
